nasb.text: When Athaliah the mother of Ahaziah saw that her son was dead, she rose and destroyed all the royal offspring.

esv.text: Now when Athaliah the mother of Ahaziah saw that her son was dead, she arose and destroyed all the royal family.

cnv.text: 亞哈謝的母親亞他利雅看見自己的兒子死了，就起來消滅王室所有的後裔。

ccb.text: 亚哈谢的母亲亚她利雅见儿子死了，便决定除掉王室后裔。
